---
title: "About Me"
---

I am Rita Wang, an MSPH Epidemiology student at Emory University with a Data Science Certificate.

My research interests focus on sleep and circadian health, especially their relationship with cancer diagnosis and population health outcomes. I enjoy translating complex analyses into clear, actionable findings.

I completed my B.A. in Biology with a minor in Bioethics at the University of Virginia, where I built my foundation in population health and research methods.

### Research Interests

- Data science for public impact
- Epidemiologic study design and regression modeling
- Sleep and cancer-related health research
- Reproducible reporting and data visualization

### Contact

- GitHub: [github.com/ritawkward](https://github.com/ritawkward)
- LinkedIn: [tianran-wang-764908184](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tianran-wang-764908184/)
